title: Supreme Court takes up Trump-backed challenge to late mail ballots
shortDescription: Republicans are challenging grace periods for late mail-in ballots postmarked by Election Day. President Trump wants to abolish mail-in voting.

title: Five things to know about former FBI chief and Trump foe Robert Mueller
shortDescription: The former Marine overhauled - and, supporters say, helped save - the FBI after the 9/11 attacks. Then he took on Trump in the probe of a lifetime.

title: Who is Robert Mueller? Former FBI director, Trump foe dies at 81.
shortDescription: Here's what to know about Robert Mueller, the former FBI director and Trump foe who died on Saturday, March 21, at the age of 81.

title: Trump responds to Robert Mueller's death. 'I'm glad.'
shortDescription: Amid sober tributes to the former FBI director, President Trump wrote: "I’m glad he’s dead. He can no longer hurt innocent people!"

title: Trump threatens ICE airport move
shortDescription: President Donald Trump warns he may deploy ICE to airports as TSA workers go unpaid during the partial government shutdown.

title: Former FBI director Robert Mueller, who led Trump Russia probe, dead at 81
shortDescription: Ex-FBI chief Robert Mueller, who served as special counsel in an investigation into Russia's interference in the 2016 presidential election, has died.

title: Trump says he will send ICE agents to airports if TSA doesn't get funds
shortDescription: Long lines have plagued U.S. airports amid a partial government shutdown. "I look forward to seeing ICE in action at our Airports," Trump posted.

title: Trump threatens to destroy Iran's power plants over Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: Less than a day after saying the war was "winding down," President Trump threatened to destroy Iran's power plants if the Strait of Hormuz isn't opened.

title: Trump’s SAVE Act spurs partisan fight, but would it actually help GOP?
shortDescription: The president says the election security bill 'will guarantee the midterms' for Republicans. Available data is far less clear cut. Here's why.

title: 'Tough cookie.' Trump responds to Chuck Norris death
shortDescription: "He was a really good, tough cookie,” Trump said of Chuck Norris. “You didn't want to fight him.”

title: Trump reacts to Chuck Norris death
shortDescription: President Donald Trump reacted to Chuck Norris' death, calling the action movie icon a "tough cookie."

title: Trump avoids question on ground troops in Iran
shortDescription: President Trump was pressed by reporters about whether the US would deploy troops on the ground in Iran.

title: Trump not planning on ceasefire with Iran
shortDescription: President Donald Trump made it clear he doesn't plan to call a ceasefire with Iran.

title: A kinder, gentler ICE? Mullin conciliatory, but White House says stay the course
shortDescription: Markwayne Mullin offers changes in immigration policy if confirmed to lead Homeland Security. but the White House says enforcement agenda isn't changing.

title: US Treasury advances 24k gold Trump coin
shortDescription: The U.S. Treasury is making progress on a 24k gold coin featuring President Trump's portrait at the National Portrait Gallery.

title: Trump gold coin combines his love for gold and things named after him
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has a long history of loving gold items. Now, the administration is putting his name and face on lots of things. See the list.

title: Trump says 'there's nobody to talk to' in Iran
shortDescription: President Trump said the U.S. wants to speak with the Iranian leadership but said there’s “nobody to talk to.”

title: Trump signs EO preserving Army-Navy game
shortDescription: President Trump signed an executive order to ensure the only college football game played the second Saturday in December is between Army and Navy.

title: Trump admin sues Harvard, says it 'rewarded' attacks on Jewish students
shortDescription: The Trump administration sued Harvard, alleging it "rewarded students who assaulted, harassed, or intimidated their Jewish and Israeli peers."

title: Oil and water. Hidden stakes of the war in Iran | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Here's why oil and water disruptions in the Middle East affect energy, fertilizer and food prices here at home.
